subcodes.first_line: O ye two assured souls! Your letter was received and from its contents it was understood that, praise be unto God [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای دو نفس مطمئنه نامهٌ شما رسید از مضمون مفهوم شد که الحمد لله
subcodes.subjects: @praise and encouragement, @love, unity, and fellowship among the friends; in the Cause
